signals.headline: Mavericks end 14-game home losing streak with 134-128 victory over Lakers** | YES | HIGH confidence
signals.raw:
Mavericks end 14-game home losing streak with 134-128 victory over Lakers** | YES | HIGH confidence
Cooper Flagg scored 45 points in Dallas's win over Los Angeles, ending their longest home losing streak in 32 years.[1] This is a significant turnaround for the Mavericks.

signals.headline: Lakers secure playoff berth despite injuries** | YES | HIGH confidence
signals.raw:
Lakers secure playoff berth despite injuries** | YES | HIGH confidence
The Lakers remain playoff-bound despite losing Luka Doncic and Austin Reaves for the rest of the regular season.[1] LeBron James had 30 points and 15 assists in the loss.

signals.headline: ELON MUSK TWEET COUNT MARKETS DOMINATE POLYMARKET TRENDING | YES | HIGH**
signals.raw:
ELON MUSK TWEET COUNT MARKETS DOMINATE POLYMARKET TRENDING | YES | HIGH**  
Polymarket's most active markets focus on **Elon Musk's tweet volume**, such as "Elon Musk # tweets April 17 - April 24, 2026?" (41% on 220-239 range) and "Elon Musk # tweets in April 2026?" (24% on 1120-1159, 22% on same in related market), with over $21.5M-$21.7M trading volume across 20-130 live tweet prediction markets

signals.headline: Flagg records back-to-back 40-point games (historic rookie achievement)** | YES | HIGH confidence
signals.raw:
Flagg records back-to-back 40-point games (historic rookie achievement)** | YES | HIGH confidence
The 19-year-old No. 1 pick scored 51 points two nights prior, then 45 points in the Lakers game, making him the first rookie with consecutive 40-point games since Allen Iverson in 1996-97.[1][2] This is his fourth career 40-point game, breaking a tie with LeBron James for most by a teenager in NBA his
